title: Jaden's Nether Expansion
description: Nether Expansion is a Vanilla Friendly Mod that aims to Improve & Add New Content to every aspect of The Nether
body:
![Jaden's Nether Expansion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdb3c4aad0fcb53cee0c5445d7a2dad8e20bb230_0.webp)

![linebreak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff630fd2596dc2023e88baed49442e1e4f69d31b.png) ![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2475e1dc950bd380a4814c3e8ebc3fcc45a6a61.png) **Jaden's Nether Expansion** is a vanilla friendly mod which aims to Expand the entire Nether Dimension adding various new content and as well as overhauling existing vanilla concepts as well, this project is evergrowing and is constantly being updated so prepare yourself for the biggest nether mod yet. It started out as a humble texture pack but has turned into fully fleshed out mod for Forge 1.20.1+ For any questions, check out the join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/y9zpxHeQuC) **or check out the [Wiki](https://www.notion.so/Jaden-s-Nether-Expansion-5e297f08f3514b8287ebffb527f318a4) for Full Documentation regarding the mod** [![wiki](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1111833/description_a992a26a-ea57-429e-8c1b-226778aaab4e.png)](https://www.notion.so/Jaden-s-Nether-Expansion-5e297f08f3514b8287ebffb527f318a4) ![linebreak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff630fd2596dc2023e88baed49442e1e4f69d31b.png) ![Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a611311d689ba4a3725c28f29575553b27d86a7c.png) [![Elysium API](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1111833/description_cd557a59-af44-44ba-91d7-6ee66c8cdc2d.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/elysium-api) ![linebreak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff630fd2596dc2023e88baed49442e1e4f69d31b.png) ![Roadmap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/603cf9280a9882bd623ee6608592e6ca439568b1.png) ![Roadmap JNE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79497d3bc91aaf3ca5dbf7fe44b830c7dcb23890_0.webp) Jaden's Nether Expansion is constantly updating and so far this is only 1/8th of the whole thing! I'm going to be updating all 5 Vanilla Biomes and adding 4 New Biomes as well Each with their own unique Blocks, Items, Mobs, Game Mechanics and More! ![linebreak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff630fd2596dc2023e88baed49442e1e4f69d31b.png) ![Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11590b90cdf1650895af7e600a040cf17b2198ac.png)

Contributors [Ceasingbonsai17](https://modrinth.com/user/Bon_Exists) - Contributed Shroomlight, Lightspores and Several Mod Compat Textures [Alganaut](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCH2eK7HVNIQZpDlGS9Ton3g) - made Black Stray texture [LudoCrypt](https://ludocrypt.bandcamp.com) - Composed Cricket Music Disc [Faithful](https://faithfulpack.net) - Pixel Consistent Magma Cube textures are taken from Faithful 32x and 64x [Wawwior](https://github.com/Wawwior/) - Helped fix a some bugs and issues [Sydokiddo](https://x.com/Sydokiddo) - Suggested the name Soul Slate
Translators [Julius](https://juliusportfolio.carrd.co) - Brazilian Portuguese [pt_br] [0Starocean0](https://github.com/0Starocean0) - Simplified Chinese [zh_cn] [octaginta](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/octagintaa/) - Turkish [tr_tr] [SirColor](https://www.youtube.com/@sir_color) - Spanish [es_es] [Wawwior](https://github.com/Wawwior/) & ThatJadenXgamer - German [de_de] [AlexeyR2D2](https://github.com/AlexeyR2D2) & Linor - Russian [ru_ru] [Sandro](https://www.curseforge.com/members/AleXandr22/favorites) - Italian \[it\_it\] [unroman](https://github.com/unroman) - Ukrainian \[uk\_ua\] [EtherealTams](https://github.com/Tamakii-2005) - Argentine Spanish \[es\_ar\] [TheDarkWatcher](https://github.com/TheDarkWatchernether) - Polish [pl_pl]
![linebreak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff630fd2596dc2023e88baed49442e1e4f69d31b.png) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f5988a82c3d6604b6b28d775158ccbdce9150a2.png) **Q: Is Jaden's Nether Expansion still a Datapack/Resource Pack?** A: No, JNE has been been completely reworked into a proper mod for Forge and Fabric **Q: When will you update to X minecraft version?** A: I will eventually but currently no ETAs **Q: Backports?** A: No. **Q: Why was Fabric Port discontinued?** A: Managing such a massive project like JNE on both modloaders was becoming too demanding. and the Fabric API itself was lackluster and held back this mod a lot, moving forward JNE is going to be Forge/NeoForge Exclusive ![linebreak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff630fd2596dc2023e88baed49442e1e4f69d31b.png)
